review_title: A nice place in not so nice location
review_text_liked: The staff were amazing - very polite, forthcoming and spoke English. We asked for our bungalow to be changed (for a smaller one but with a tighter roof, as we were afraid insects would be coming in) and they did it straight away. We ate dinner and breakfast onsite and both were good. If you want beer however, you need to bring your own. The room itself was good, clean, enough space and comfy beds.
review_text_disliked: The place is a bit of work in progress, the bungalows are just in a narrow field, some are still being build. The location is not great. We came from Ubud to do sightseeing in the north of Bali and we could have just gone back instead of staying here to be honest, as you are in the middle of nowhere. From the property you can walk to a small shop or to the lake, anywhere else you would need to take a taxi or ride a moped. The nearby lake (5 mins) is lined with rubbish, which is very depressing - you can skip a visit to the lake altogether.

review_title: Pleasant hotel with limited restaurant facilities
review_text_liked: Don’t be offput by the building-site appearance of the parking area! Room very nice and tranquil. Staff very helpful. Food in restaurant mostly good, but limited menu
review_text_disliked: The access road is controlled and ‘internationals’ are charged and entry fee of 30,000 rp each- the gate is less than 100m from the hotel The hotel is across the road and down-hill from the lake- don’t expect lake views!! Restaurant does not have beer on menu- helpful staff able to precure but at 100% mark-up price. Mee and rice dishes great but treat the desert menu with caution: Tried “roti” desert dishes- these turned out to be plain white bread, toasted and smeared with jam/ nutella… Walk to town manageable but not very pleasant-can walk along the highway in reasonable safety of there is a foot path which winds mainly on lake side of the highway but is very messy

review_text_liked: Only the location is good, It is closer to the lake. Other than that, the stay only looks good to see but smells very bad. The staff were very friendly, I requested them to clean the room and remove the bugs and they did it immediately.
review_text_disliked: The room smelled very bad. I was getting a variety of bad odour inside the room. Looks like these guys don't know how to run a stay. There is no fridge in the room, the sheets smelled bad, bed shelled bad and the entire room smelled bad. There are tiny cockroaches running around in the room. There were stains in the curtains, looks like it's was never cleaned. The bathroom was ok but it does not have ventilation. So all the bad odors from the toilet enters the room. I wouldn't prefer returning to this place ever again.

owner_resp_text: Dear Mr. Nikhil and partner, Thank you for your recent stay at Navalia Villa. We do apologize that during your stay we couldn't deliver a service that meet your expectation. Honestly the nonstop raining we have nowadays causing a big issue to our area moreover we are in the middle of the farm causing some insect and flies come over to our place. Yes we don't have a fridge in our room that why we didn't mention it in our page, but you can still ask our staff to keep your things in our fridge in the kitchen. Once again we do apologize for your experience, wishing you have a great day and thank you for your stay. Regards, Putu Andre

review_title: This property has more learning to do before it accepts guests.
review_text_liked: The gardens were lovely. Mattress was comfortable.
review_text_disliked: The signage for the property is minimal, so it was hard to find. The family villa has a bedroom and a cell with no door for the second bedroom. Mosquitos are a problem. Hot water didn’t work until we asked it to be fixed (twice). We witnessed the same problem for other guests staying too. The bathroom had no ventilation. There were no additional blankets to use if required. We had to ask for the correct number of towels, glasses etc so each guests staying was catered for. Even then, there were not enough to be provided then, so we didn’t receive any until the next day. Dropping from insects/lizards that live in the thatched roof were all over the bed. Two of our group got sick from eating food at the onsite restaurant. Food handling, storage and preparation needs to be improved or this will continue to reoccur with guests. Items on menu were not available. Restaurant didn’t open on time. Food took a long time to be served. Other guests staying were above the capacity of the amount allowable for each room. They were noisy until late in the evening and then again early in the morning, even when we requested them to be quiet. No consideration of other guests (and these were Indonesians!) Staff did not intervene on our behalf, but were aware. Staff are too young and inexperienced to overcome challenges independently. There needs to be a manager onsite to provide leadership.

review_text_liked: The staff tried very hard to be friendly and helpful
review_text_disliked: This review is for the very old and probably the original villa. It is listed on booking.com as Twin. There are newer villas that look much better. There were no windows and ventilation was via a small hatch the door was also made of timber compared to the newer villas which were glass and with a view outside. The worst aspect of this villa was a bathroom with no ventilation Over the years the grouting had become dirty and full of grime. There was black mould on the ceiling It was not up to an acceptable standard Again the staff tried hard in the restaurant but an hour wait for a meal showed a lack of staff. Food basic There is NO view of the Lake

review_title: جيد لمن يحب السفر وليس ذو مطالب عالية
review_text_liked: الموقع كان جميل بالنسبة لي، منعزل بعيد عن ازعاج المدينة و السيارات و الدبابات المنطقة باردة و تمسي ابرد في الليل يوجد مطعم متواضع تابع للمكان يطبخون اطباق جيدة و تفي للفطور و العشاء لكنه ليس متنوع لذلك ربما امل بعد عدة ايام طلبت تضيف الغرفة في اليوم الثاني و قاموا بترتيبها جيدا يوجد مياه ساخنة و فرشات اسنان الموظفين جدمتعاونون جدا طلبت استئجار دباب و تم توفيرا لي بعد الاتفاق كلفني 100 ألف في اليوم الغرفة واسعة و دورت المياه جيدة
review_text_disliked: البسة الفرش كانت متسخة في اليوم الاول و في اليوم الثالث طلبت تبديلها تم ذلك لكن جأتني متسخة ببقع أخرى ربما الغسالات عندهم لا تعمل بالشكل الجيد لان رائحتها كانت جيدة ولكن مبقعة بالنسبة لي لم يكن شيء مزعجا بشكل كبير😁 الموقع في الليل يعتبر الطريق له مضلم و موحش لو كنت ستاتي الى الفندق مشيا بالنسبة لي كان شيء جيدا لاني تعمدت البحث عن مكان منعزل

review_text_liked: Nous avons passé un bon séjour au sein de Navalia Villa Bedugul. Le personnel est très agréable et souriant, à votre écoute et prêt à vous aider. L’établissement possède un petit restaurant avec une carte assez complète à des prix plus que raisonnable. Pour les musulmans et musulmanes, il y a une petite mosquée au sein de l’établissement avec toilette et espace pour faire ses ablutions. Le seul bémol est qu’il n’y a pas de salle pour homme et femme mais une seule et même salle.

review_text_liked: Nos cambiaron de habitación sin coste ya que en la primera que nos alojaron las ventanas no tenian cortinas y a primera hora entraba la luz de frente. La zona es tranquila, la comida del restaurante está sorprendentemente buena, sobretodo el Soto Ayam. El personal es muy atento y servicial.
review_text_disliked: Se escucha demasiado el ruido del exterior y de las demás habitaciones. Por la mañana al amanecer puedes escuchar como los vecinos de alrededor del hotel pasan con sus ruidosas motos por la carretera de al lado de las habitaciones. La limpieza puede mejorar bastante. La carretera para llegar al hotel está en bastante mal estado, y además, a según que horas accedas al hotel hay un guardia a la entrada de la calle que te obliga a pagar 15.000IDR cada vez que entres aunque vayas al hotel y no al lago!

review_title: Una struttura con grandi potenzialità in sviluppo. Tel
review_text_liked: La struttura è nuova ed è molto carina. I dettagli non sono curati ma questo è un classico in Asia. Ad esempio il lavabo non era del tutto stabile ed appendi-asciugamani ballerino. Ma a parte questi dettagli la camera in se era molto graziosa, spaziosa e dotato di tutti i comfort Attenzione che è piuttosto freschino e serve un rafforzamento dell' abbigliamento sia per dormire che per girare i vari posti. La WiFi è ottima. Forniscono il servizio di colazione che solitamente è da pagare 5 euro a persona ma nel nostro caso ci è stata generosamente offerta. Il personale ed in generale i vari servizi sono molto vergini e si palpa un clima di disorientamento e di formazione. La colazione era molto essenziale nella scelta: noodle fritti, riso fritto o americana con toast e uova e salsiccia.
review_text_disliked: La camera ahimè non è mai stata rifatta, ne pulita né altro. La posizione è un po' defilata rispetto al resto.

review_text_liked: La localización era buena y el hotel estaba cerca de las atracciones principales de la zona.
review_text_disliked: La habitación no tenía casi luz y la habitación pequeña era muy pequeña y estrecha. Nos alquilaron dos motos que no funcionaban los frenos y se excusaron en que todas las motos son así y los frenos se desactivan si los usas mucho. Teniendo en cuenta que la mayoría de carreteras en Bali son cuestas estaría bien informar de ese detalle antes de alquilarlas. Tampoco nos limpiaron la habitación ningún día ni preguntaron si lo necesitábamos. El restaurante teóricamente estaba abierto hasta las 22h pero un día fuimos a las 21h y estaba cerrado. Solo había un hombre que no hablaba inglés.

Teniendo en cuenta que la mayoría de carreteras en Bali son cuestas estaría bien informar de ese detalle antes de alquilarlas. Tampoco nos limpiaron la habitación ningún día ni preguntaron si lo necesitábamos. El restaurante teóricamente estaba abierto hasta las 22h pero un día fuimos a las 21h y estaba cerrado. Solo había un hombre que no hablaba inglés.
